InstructionData.Title: Farm Automation 1
InstructionData.Author: Scriptslol
InstructionData.Instructions:
#################################################### # Planter Automation Controller ####################################################
alias plants1 d0 alias plants2 d1 alias plants3 d2 alias harvie1 d3 alias harvie2 d4 alias harvie3 d5
loop: jal check1 jal check2 jal check3 j loop
#--------------------------------------------------- check1: yield ls r0 plants1 0 Mature s harvie1 On r0 beq r0 0 ra # if not mature, return to loop l r0 harvie1 Activate #beq r0 1 ra # if already active, return to loop bgtz r0 ra #this approach attempts to avoid lock bug s harvie1 Harvest 1 # made it here? begin harvest yield j ra
#--------------------------------------------------- check2: yield ls r0 plants2 0 Mature s harvie2 On r0 beq r0 0 ra l r0 harvie2 Activate #beq r0 1 ra bgtz r0 ra s harvie2 Harvest 1 yield j ra
#--------------------------------------------------- check3: yield ls r0 plants3 0 Mature s harvie3 On r0 beq r0 0 ra l r0 harvie3 Activate #beq r0 1 ra bgtz r0 ra s harvie3 Harvest 1 yield j ra
